1.content:
### Host Monitoring Costs
This section covers the total cost and distribution of monitored Hosts in your environment, broken down by monitoring mode.

4.content:
#### Dashboard Overview  📊
Identify, prioritise, and act on license optimisation opportunities.
This dashboard highlights areas of duplication, underutilisation and unoptimised configuration, helping teams take immediate steps to reduce overhead and maximise observability value.

Please ensure you've updated the rate card variables at the top of the Dashboard to match your rate card values shown in the Account Management Portal.

108.title: Full Stack

109.title: Infrastructure Only
109.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Infrastructure Monitoring"
| dedup event.id
| lookup [
fetch dt.entity.host
| fieldsAdd tags
//| filter matchesPhrase(tags, "$Business_Unit")
], sourceField: dt.entity.host, lookupField: id, fields: {tags}
| summarize billed_hours = sum(billed_host_hours)
| fieldsAdd cost = (billed_hours)/100000*(toDouble($Infrastructure_Cost))
| fieldsRemove billed_hours

110.title: Foundation & Discovery
110.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Foundation & Discovery"
| dedup event.id
| lookup [
fetch dt.entity.host
| fieldsAdd tags
//| filter matchesPhrase(tags, "$Business_Unit")
], sourceField: dt.entity.host, lookupField: id, fields: {tags}
| summarize billed_hours = sum(billed_host_hours)
| fieldsAdd cost = if(billed_hours > 0, ((billed_hours)/100000*(toDouble($Foundation_Discovery_Cost))), else: 0)
| fieldsRemove billed_hours

117.title: Host List
117.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
| dedup event.id
| summarize billed_gibibyte = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours), by:{dt.entity.host}
| fieldsAdd cost = (billed_gibibyte)/(100000)*toDouble($Full_Stack_Cost)
| fields host_id = dt.entity.host, host_name = entityAttr(dt.entity.host, "entity.name"), billed_gibibyte, cost
| lookup[
  fetch dt.entity.host, from: now() - 1h
  | fieldsAdd monitoringMode, tags
  | filter monitoringMode == "FULL_STACK"
  | fieldsAdd nr_of_services = arraySize(runs[dt.entity.service])
  | fieldsAdd nr_of_services = if(isNull(nr_of_services), 0, else: nr_of_services)
//  | filter nr_of_services == 0
], sourceField: host_id, lookupField: id, fields: {nr_of_services, tags}
| filter nr_of_services == 0
| fieldsAdd Service_Detection = if(nr_of_services == 0, "⚠️ No Services Detected", else: "✅ Service Detected")
| fieldsRemove nr_of_services, tags
| sort billed_gibibyte DESC

123.title: Distribution

126.title: Daily Total Cost

131.content: This section reviews Browser Synthetic monitors by frequency, locations, steps, billable steps, and availability. Stable monitors with high billable usage may be candidates for reduced frequency or fewer locations. Monitors with very high failure rates should be reviewed for misconfiguration, obsolete tests, or unavailable endpoints. Additionally, this section identifies Synthetic monitors that appear to test the same URL. Review groups with the most monitors or highest billable usage first. Where monitors do not serve a unique purpose, consider consolidating coverage and disabling duplicates

134.title: Total Hosts
134.query:
fetch dt.entity.host, from: now() - 1h
| fieldsAdd monitoringMode, tags
| filter monitoringMode == "FULL_STACK"
| fieldsAdd nr_of_services = arraySize(runs[dt.entity.service])
| fieldsAdd nr_of_services = if(isNull(nr_of_services), 0, else: nr_of_services)
| filter nr_of_services == 0
| summarize count()

135.content:
###  Full-Stack Monitoring Optimisation Opportunities
This section covers all Full-stack monitored hosts in this environment which currently have ZERO monitored services being detected. These hosts should be investigated to determine if they are suitable Infrastructure only of Foundation and Discovery monitoring candidates.

136.title: Clickpath Synthetic Monitor Cost and Execution Breakdown

137.title: Daily Total Cost
137.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filter event.type == "Browser Monitor or Clickpath"
| fieldsAdd entityName(dt.entity.synthetic_test)
| summarize billed_action_count = sum(billed_synthetic_action_count), by:{dt.entity.synthetic_test, timestamp}
| makeTimeseries `Daily Cost` = sum(billed_action_count/100000*toDouble($Browser_Synthetic_Cost)), interval: 24h

138.title: Total Cost
138.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filter event.type == "Browser Monitor or Clickpath"
| fieldsAdd entityName(dt.entity.synthetic_test)
| summarize billed_action_count = sum(billed_synthetic_action_count)
| fieldsAdd cost = (billed_action_count/100000*toDouble($Browser_Synthetic_Cost))
| fieldsRemove billed_action_count

139.content:
This section of the dashboard highlights potentially inefficient usage for DQL queries for Logs, Traces & Events. 

DQL queries executed against billable data in Dashboards, Notebooks and the Anomaly Detection App should be investigated to identify whether they can be converted to metrics via OpenPipeline, and query the metric instead. This often ends up being significantly more cost effective than querying the Logs, Traces & Events directly.

142.title: Top 25 documents by usage - Logs
142.description: % change is for the query volume change. Not the user change.
142.query:
fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from) - (toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) - toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from)), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), scanLimitGBytes: -1
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Log Management & Analytics - Query"
| dedup event.id
| filter in(client.application_context, "dynatrace.dashboards", "dynatrace.notebooks")
| parse client.source, "LD '/ui/' LD:app_type '/' STRING:document_id"
| parse client.source, "'https://' LD '--' LD:tenant_id ('--' | '.') LD"
| filter isNotNull(document_id)
| fieldsAdd period = if(toTimestamp(timestamp) >= toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), "current", else: "previous")
| summarize {
    `Query volume` = sum(billed_bytes),
    `Views` = count(),
    `Users` = countDistinct(user.email),
    tenant = takeFirst(tenant_id)
  }, by: {
    document_id,
    period,
    client.application_context
  }
| summarize {
    `Current Period` = sum(if(period == "current", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Views` = sum(if(period == "current", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Views` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Users` = sum(if(period == "current", `Users`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Users` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Users`, else: 0)),
    tenant_id = takeFirst(tenant)    
  }, by: { `DocumentId` = document_id, `Application` = client.application_context }
| sort `Current Period` desc
| limit 25
| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = if(Application == "dynatrace.dashboards", 
    concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/", `DocumentId`),
    else: concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.notebooks/notebook/", `DocumentId`))
| fieldsRemove tenant_id
| fieldsAdd `Change` = `Current Period` - `Previous Period`
| fieldsAdd `Change (%)` = if(`Previous Period` > 0, (`Current Period` - `Previous Period`) / `Previous Period` * 100, else: "++ NEW ++")
| fieldsAdd Trend = if(`Change` > 0, "📈 Up", else: if(`Change` < 0, "📉 Down", else: "➡️ Stable"))

| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = concat("[Open](", `Document Link`, ")")
| fieldsRemove `Previous Period`, "Change"

| fieldsAdd diffViews = toLong(`Current Period Views` - `Previous Period Views`)
| fieldsAdd diffViews = if (diffViews > 0, concat("+", diffViews), else: diffViews)
| fieldsAdd Views = concat(toLong(`Current Period Views`), " (",  diffViews ,")")

| fieldsAdd diffUsers = toLong(`Current Period Users` - `Previous Period Users`)
| fieldsAdd diffUsers = if (diffUsers > 0, concat("+", diffUsers), else: diffUsers)
| fieldsAdd Users = concat(toLong(`Current Period Users`), " (",  diffUsers ,")")
| fieldsRemove diffViews, diffUsers, `Current Period Users`, `Previous Period Users`, `Current Period Views`, `Previous Period Views`
| fieldsRename `Query volume` = `Current Period`

143.title: Top 25 documents by usage - Traces
143.query:
fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from) - (toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) - toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from)), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), scanLimitGBytes: -1
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Query"
| dedup event.id
| filter in(client.application_context, "dynatrace.dashboards", "dynatrace.notebooks")
| parse client.source, "LD '/ui/' LD:app_type '/' STRING:document_id"
| parse client.source, "'https://' LD '--' LD:tenant_id ('--' | '.') LD"
| filter isNotNull(document_id)
| fieldsAdd period = if(toTimestamp(timestamp) >= toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), "current", else: "previous")
| summarize {
    `Query volume` = sum(billed_bytes),
    `Views` = count(),
    `Users` = countDistinct(user.email),
    tenant = takeFirst(tenant_id)
  }, by: {
    document_id,
    period,
    client.application_context
  }
| summarize {
    `Current Period` = sum(if(period == "current", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Views` = sum(if(period == "current", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Views` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Users` = sum(if(period == "current", `Users`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Users` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Users`, else: 0)),
    tenant_id = takeFirst(tenant)    
  }, by: { `DocumentId` = document_id, `Application` = client.application_context }
| sort `Current Period` desc
| limit 25
| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = if(Application == "dynatrace.dashboards", 
    concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/", `DocumentId`),
    else: concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.notebooks/notebook/", `DocumentId`))
| fieldsRemove tenant_id
| fieldsAdd `Change` = `Current Period` - `Previous Period`
| fieldsAdd `Change (%)` = if(`Previous Period` > 0, (`Current Period` - `Previous Period`) / `Previous Period` * 100, else: "++ NEW ++")
| fieldsAdd Trend = if(`Change` > 0, "📈 Up", else: if(`Change` < 0, "📉 Down", else: "➡️ Stable"))

| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = concat("[Open](", `Document Link`, ")")
| fieldsRemove `Previous Period`, "Change"

| fieldsAdd diff = toLong(`Current Period Views` - `Previous Period Views`)
| fieldsAdd diff = if (diff > 0, concat("+", diff), else: diff)
| fieldsAdd Views = concat(toLong(`Current Period Views`), " (",  diff ,")")

| fieldsAdd diff1 = toLong(`Current Period Users` - `Previous Period Users`)
| fieldsAdd diff2 = if (diff > 0, concat("+", diff), else: diff)
| fieldsAdd Users = concat(toLong(`Current Period Users`), " (",  diff ,")")
| fieldsRemove diff, diff1, diff2, `Current Period Users`, `Previous Period Users`, `Current Period Views`, `Previous Period Views`
| fieldsRename `Query volume` = `Current Period`

145.title: Potential Duplicate Synthetic Monitors
145.query:
fetch dt.entity.http_check_step
| fields entity.name, dt.entity.http_check = belongs_to[`dt.entity.http_check`]
| fields monitor_name = entityName(dt.entity.http_check), url = entity.name, entity_type = "HTTP Monitor"
| append [
    fetch dt.entity.synthetic_test
    | fieldsAdd url
    | fields monitor_name = entity.name, url, entity_type = "Browser Monitor"
    | filter isNotNull(url)
]
| summarize by:{url, entity_type}, {monitor_count = count(), monitors = collectDistinct(monitor_name)}
| filter monitor_count > 1
| sort monitor_count desc

146.title: Potential Duplicate Browser Monitors
146.query:
fetch dt.entity.synthetic_test
| fieldsAdd url
| fields monitor_name = entity.name, url, entity_type = "Browser Monitor"
| filter isNotNull(url)
| summarize by:{url, entity_type}, {monitor_count = count(), monitors = collectDistinct(monitor_name)}
| filter monitor_count > 1
| sort monitor_count desc
| summarize count = sum(monitor_count)

147.title: Potential Duplicate HTTP Monitors
147.query:
fetch dt.entity.http_check_step
| fields entity.name, dt.entity.http_check = belongs_to[`dt.entity.http_check`]
| fields monitor_name = entityName(dt.entity.http_check), url = entity.name, entity_type = "HTTP Monitor"
| summarize by:{url, entity_type}, {monitor_count = count(), monitors = collectDistinct(monitor_name)}
| filter monitor_count > 1
| sort monitor_count desc
| summarize count = sum(monitor_count)

149.title: Total GiB of Logs Queried
149.description: % change is for the query volume change. Not the user change.
149.query:
fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), scanLimitGBytes: -1
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Log Management & Analytics - Query"
| dedup event.id
| filter in(client.application_context, "dynatrace.dashboards", "dynatrace.notebooks")
| parse client.source, "LD '/ui/' LD:app_type '/' STRING:document_id"
| parse client.source, "'https://' LD '--' LD:tenant_id ('--' | '.') LD"
| filter isNotNull(document_id)
| fieldsAdd period = if(toTimestamp(timestamp) >= toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), "current", else: "previous")
| summarize {
    `Query volume` = sum(billed_bytes),
    `Views` = count(),
    `Users` = countDistinct(user.email),
    tenant = takeFirst(tenant_id)
  }, by: {
    document_id,
    period,
    client.application_context
  }
| summarize {
    `Current Period` = sum(if(period == "current", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Views` = sum(if(period == "current", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Views` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Users` = sum(if(period == "current", `Users`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Users` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Users`, else: 0)),
    tenant_id = takeFirst(tenant)    
  }, by: { `DocumentId` = document_id, `Application` = client.application_context }
| sort `Current Period` desc
| limit 25
| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = if(Application == "dynatrace.dashboards", 
    concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/", `DocumentId`),
    else: concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.notebooks/notebook/", `DocumentId`))
| fieldsRemove tenant_id
| fieldsAdd `Change` = `Current Period` - `Previous Period`
| fieldsAdd `Change (%)` = if(`Previous Period` > 0, (`Current Period` - `Previous Period`) / `Previous Period` * 100, else: "++ NEW ++")
| fieldsAdd Trend = if(`Change` > 0, "📈 Up", else: if(`Change` < 0, "📉 Down", else: "➡️ Stable"))

| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = concat("[Open](", `Document Link`, ")")
| fieldsRemove `Previous Period`, "Change"

| fieldsAdd diffViews = toLong(`Current Period Views` - `Previous Period Views`)
| fieldsAdd diffViews = if (diffViews > 0, concat("+", diffViews), else: diffViews)
| fieldsAdd Views = concat(toLong(`Current Period Views`), " (",  diffViews ,")")

| fieldsAdd diffUsers = toLong(`Current Period Users` - `Previous Period Users`)
| fieldsAdd diffUsers = if (diffUsers > 0, concat("+", diffUsers), else: diffUsers)
| fieldsAdd Users = concat(toLong(`Current Period Users`), " (",  diffUsers ,")")
| fieldsRemove diffViews, diffUsers, `Current Period Users`, `Previous Period Users`, `Current Period Views`, `Previous Period Views`
| fieldsRename `Query volume` = `Current Period`
| summarize `Total` = sum(`Query volume`)

152.title: Total cost of Logs queried
152.description: % change is for the query volume change. Not the user change.
152.query:
fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), scanLimitGBytes: -1
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Log Management & Analytics - Query"
| dedup event.id
| filter in(client.application_context, "dynatrace.dashboards", "dynatrace.notebooks")
| parse client.source, "LD '/ui/' LD:app_type '/' STRING:document_id"
| parse client.source, "'https://' LD '--' LD:tenant_id ('--' | '.') LD"
| filter isNotNull(document_id)
| fieldsAdd period = if(toTimestamp(timestamp) >= toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), "current", else: "previous")
| summarize {
    `Query volume` = sum(billed_bytes),
    `Views` = count(),
    `Users` = countDistinct(user.email),
    tenant = takeFirst(tenant_id)
  }, by: {
    document_id,
    period,
    client.application_context
  }
| summarize {
    `Current Period` = sum(if(period == "current", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Views` = sum(if(period == "current", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Views` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Users` = sum(if(period == "current", `Users`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Users` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Users`, else: 0)),
    tenant_id = takeFirst(tenant)    
  }, by: { `DocumentId` = document_id, `Application` = client.application_context }
| sort `Current Period` desc
| limit 25
| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = if(Application == "dynatrace.dashboards", 
    concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/", `DocumentId`),
    else: concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.notebooks/notebook/", `DocumentId`))
| fieldsRemove tenant_id
| fieldsAdd `Change` = `Current Period` - `Previous Period`
| fieldsAdd `Change (%)` = if(`Previous Period` > 0, (`Current Period` - `Previous Period`) / `Previous Period` * 100, else: "++ NEW ++")
| fieldsAdd Trend = if(`Change` > 0, "📈 Up", else: if(`Change` < 0, "📉 Down", else: "➡️ Stable"))

| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = concat("[Open](", `Document Link`, ")")
| fieldsRemove `Previous Period`, "Change"

| fieldsAdd diffViews = toLong(`Current Period Views` - `Previous Period Views`)
| fieldsAdd diffViews = if (diffViews > 0, concat("+", diffViews), else: diffViews)
| fieldsAdd Views = concat(toLong(`Current Period Views`), " (",  diffViews ,")")

| fieldsAdd diffUsers = toLong(`Current Period Users` - `Previous Period Users`)
| fieldsAdd diffUsers = if (diffUsers > 0, concat("+", diffUsers), else: diffUsers)
| fieldsAdd Users = concat(toLong(`Current Period Users`), " (",  diffUsers ,")")
| fieldsRemove diffViews, diffUsers, `Current Period Users`, `Previous Period Users`, `Current Period Views`, `Previous Period Views`
| fieldsRename `Query volume` = `Current Period`
| summarize `Total` = (sum(`Query volume`)/1024/1024/1024/1024/1024 * toDouble($DQL_Log_Query_Cost))
| fieldsAdd `Total` = concat("$", toString(round(`Total`, decimals:2)))

153.title: Total cost of Traces queried
153.description: % change is for the query volume change. Not the user change.
153.query:
fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), scanLimitGBytes: -1
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Query"

| filter in(client.application_context, "dynatrace.dashboards", "dynatrace.notebooks")
| parse client.source, "LD '/ui/' LD:app_type '/' STRING:document_id"
| parse client.source, "'https://' LD '--' LD:tenant_id ('--' | '.') LD"
| filter isNotNull(document_id)
| fieldsAdd period = if(toTimestamp(timestamp) >= toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), "current", else: "previous")
| summarize {
    `Query volume` = sum(billed_bytes),
    `Views` = count(),
    `Users` = countDistinct(user.email),
    tenant = takeFirst(tenant_id)
  }, by: {
    document_id,

| summarize {
    `Current Period` = sum(if(period == "current", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Views` = sum(if(period == "current", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Views` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Users` = sum(if(period == "current", `Users`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Users` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Users`, else: 0)),
    tenant_id = takeFirst(tenant)    
  }, by: { `DocumentId` = document_id, `Application` = client.application_context }
| sort `Current Period` desc
| limit 25
| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = if(Application == "dynatrace.dashboards", 
    concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/", `DocumentId`),
    else: concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.notebooks/notebook/", `DocumentId`))
| fieldsRemove tenant_id
| fieldsAdd `Change` = `Current Period` - `Previous Period`
| fieldsAdd `Change (%)` = if(`Previous Period` > 0, (`Current Period` - `Previous Period`) / `Previous Period` * 100, else: "++ NEW ++")
| fieldsAdd Trend = if(`Change` > 0, "📈 Up", else: if(`Change` < 0, "📉 Down", else: "➡️ Stable"))

| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = concat("[Open](", `Document Link`, ")")
| fieldsRemove `Previous Period`, "Change"

| fieldsAdd diffViews = toLong(`Current Period Views` - `Previous Period Views`)
| fieldsAdd diffViews = if (diffViews > 0, concat("+", diffViews), else: diffViews)
| fieldsAdd Views = concat(toLong(`Current Period Views`), " (",  diffViews ,")")

| fieldsAdd diffUsers = toLong(`Current Period Users` - `Previous Period Users`)
| fieldsAdd diffUsers = if (diffUsers > 0, concat("+", diffUsers), else: diffUsers)
| fieldsAdd Users = concat(toLong(`Current Period Users`), " (",  diffUsers ,")")
| fieldsRemove diffViews, diffUsers, `Current Period Users`, `Previous Period Users`, `Current Period Views`, `Previous Period Views`
| fieldsRename `Query volume` = `Current Period`
| summarize `Total` = (sum(`Query volume`)/1024/1024/1024/1024/1024 * toDouble($DQL_Trace_Query_Cost))
| fieldsAdd `Total` = concat("$", toString(round(`Total`, decimals:2)))

154.title: Total cost of Events queried
154.description: % change is for the query volume change. Not the user change.
154.query:
fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), scanLimitGBytes: -1
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Events - Query"
| dedup event.id
| filter in(client.application_context, "dynatrace.dashboards", "dynatrace.notebooks")

| parse client.source, "'https://' LD '--' LD:tenant_id ('--' | '.') LD"
| filter isNotNull(document_id)

| summarize {
    `Query volume` = sum(billed_bytes),

    tenant = takeFirst(tenant_id)
  }, by: {
    document_id,

| summarize {
    `Current Period` = sum(if(period == "current", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Query volume`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Views` = sum(if(period == "current", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Views` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Views`, else: 0)),
    `Current Period Users` = sum(if(period == "current", `Users`, else: 0)),
    `Previous Period Users` = sum(if(period == "previous", `Users`, else: 0)),
    tenant_id = takeFirst(tenant)    
  }, by: { `DocumentId` = document_id, `Application` = client.application_context }
| sort `Current Period` desc
| limit 25
| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = if(Application == "dynatrace.dashboards", 
    concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/", `DocumentId`),
    else: concat("https://", tenant_id, ".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.notebooks/notebook/", `DocumentId`))
| fieldsRemove tenant_id
| fieldsAdd `Change` = `Current Period` - `Previous Period`
| fieldsAdd `Change (%)` = if(`Previous Period` > 0, (`Current Period` - `Previous Period`) / `Previous Period` * 100, else: "++ NEW ++")
| fieldsAdd Trend = if(`Change` > 0, "📈 Up", else: if(`Change` < 0, "📉 Down", else: "➡️ Stable"))

| fieldsAdd `Document Link` = concat("[Open](", `Document Link`, ")")
| fieldsRemove `Previous Period`, "Change"

| fieldsAdd diffViews = toLong(`Current Period Views` - `Previous Period Views`)
| fieldsAdd diffViews = if (diffViews > 0, concat("+", diffViews), else: diffViews)
| fieldsAdd Views = concat(toLong(`Current Period Views`), " (",  diffViews ,")")

| fieldsAdd diffUsers = toLong(`Current Period Users` - `Previous Period Users`)
| fieldsAdd diffUsers = if (diffUsers > 0, concat("+", diffUsers), else: diffUsers)
| fieldsAdd Users = concat(toLong(`Current Period Users`), " (",  diffUsers ,")")
| fieldsRemove diffViews, diffUsers, `Current Period Users`, `Previous Period Users`, `Current Period Views`, `Previous Period Views`
| fieldsRename `Query volume` = `Current Period`
| summarize `Total Cost` = (sum(`Query volume`/1024/1024/1024/1024/1024) * toDouble($DQL_Events_Query_Cost))
| fieldsAdd `Total` = concat("$", toString(round(`Total Cost`, decimals:2)))

155.title: Total
155.query:
fetch dt.entity.http_check_step
| fields entity.name, dt.entity.http_check = belongs_to[`dt.entity.http_check`]
| fields monitor_name = entityName(dt.entity.http_check), url = entity.name, entity_type = "HTTP Monitor"
| append [
    fetch dt.entity.synthetic_test
    | fieldsAdd url
    | fields monitor_name = entity.name, url, entity_type = "Browser Monitor"
    | filter isNotNull(url)
]
| summarize by:{url, entity_type}, {monitor_count = count(), monitors = collectDistinct(monitor_name)}
| filter monitor_count > 1
| sort monitor_count desc
| summarize total = sum(monitor_count)

165.query:
fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), scanLimitGBytes: -1
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Log Management & Analytics - Query"
| dedup event.id
| filter in(client.application_context, {"dynatrace.dashboards", "dynatrace.notebooks"})
| parse client.source, "LD '/ui/' LD:app_type '/' STRING:document_id"
| filter isNotNull(document_id)
| fieldsAdd document_type = if(client.application_context == "dynatrace.dashboards", "Dashboard", else: "Notebook")
| makeTimeseries `Query Volume` = sum(billed_bytes), by: {document_id, document_type}, interval: 24h

166.query:

| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Query"
| dedup event.id
| filter in(client.application_context, {"dynatrace.dashboards", "dynatrace.notebooks"})

168.query:
fetch dt.system.query_executions
| filter client.internal_service_context == "dt.davis.anomaly-detector"
| filter table == "bizevents" OR table == "logs" OR table == "spans"
| summarize `Query Volume` = (sum(scanned_bytes)), by:{client.source, user.email}
| sort `Query Volume` desc

170.title: Total Query Volume
170.query:
fetch dt.system.query_executions
| filter client.internal_service_context == "dt.davis.anomaly-detector"
| filter table == "bizevents" OR table == "logs" OR table == "spans"
| summarize `Total GiB` = (sum(scanned_bytes))

171.query:
fetch dt.system.query_executions
| filter client.internal_service_context == "dt.davis.anomaly-detector"
| filter table == "bizevents" OR table == "logs" OR table == "spans"
| makeTimeseries (sum(scanned_bytes)), by:{user.email}, interval:24h

172.title: Total Cost
172.query:
fetch dt.system.query_executions
| filter client.internal_service_context == "dt.davis.anomaly-detector"
| filter table == "bizevents" OR table == "logs" OR table == "spans"
| summarize `Total GiB` = (sum(scanned_bytes)/1024/1024/1024/1024/1024 * toDouble($DQL_Log_Query_Cost))
| fieldsAdd `Total Cost`  = concat("$", toString(round(`Total GiB`, decimals:2)))

175.content: This section highlights Anomaly Detection configurations running DQL queries against billable logs, traces, or events. Review the highest scanned-volume detectors first and confirm whether the current execution timing is required. Potential optimisations include adding execution delays or using OpenPipeline to convert frequently queried data into metrics.
